change-password-online-warning: If this installation is going to be online, you should change the password to a more secure one.
company-iban-changed: The IBAN of bank account %account% has been changed. It was %old% and now it is %new%.
desc-alfa-code-2: Oficial identification for name of countries and other administratives units
desc-alfa-code-3: Oficial identification for name of countries and other administratives units
pattern-without-number: The chosen pattern does not include a number, so it is very likely that it will generate duplicate codes.
pattern-without-serie: The chosen pattern does not include a series, so it is possible that it will generate duplicate codes for each series
pattern-without-year: The chosen pattern does not include exercise or date, so it is possible that it generates duplicate codes in each exercise
related-subaccount-bank-charges: Related subaccount for bank charges (commissions, etc.)
related-subaccount-purchases-sales: Related subaccount for purchases and sales
supplier-iban-changed: The IBAN of the bank account of supplier %codproveedor% has been changed. It was %old% and now it is %new%.
use-holes-invoices-esp: If you uncheck the use of gaps in invoices and delete some, the gap will remain in the billing and you will have problems with the treasury
wizard-iban-help: Bank account that will appear on invoices.
wizard-p: Fill out this form about your business to finish the configuration.
